MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephanie R. Hanning, of Schmid & Voiles, Tel. 213.473.8700, for defendants, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT SCOTT MOSSER M.D.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/RBU)
